workflows.name: Search from Hotels tab
workflows.on_success: redirects to Hotels results listing page

workflows.name: Search from Flights tab
workflows.on_success: redirects to Flights results listing page

workflows.name: Search from Tours tab
workflows.on_success: redirects to Tours results listing page

workflows.name: Search from Cars tab
workflows.on_success: redirects to Cars results listing page

workflows.name: Register new user (standard form submission)
workflows.on_success: creates account; either automatically logs in and redirects to dashboard, or prompts user to verify email before gaining access

workflows.name: Login without CAPTCHA
workflows.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page

workflows.name: Login with CAPTCHA required
workflows.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page

workflows.name: Forgot Password link
workflows.on_success: navigates to Forgot Password flow

workflows.name: Login with Google (social enabled)
workflows.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page

workflows.name: Login with Facebook (social enabled)
workflows.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page

workflows.name: Request password reset (Reset Password button)
workflows.on_success: sends reset link to that address and shows confirmation message

workflows.name: Complete password reset (Change Password button)
workflows.on_success: updates password and redirects to login page with success message

workflows.name: Search hotels using search form
workflows.on_success: redirects to Hotels_Listing page

workflows.name: Sort results by Price: Low to High
workflows.on_success: results updated and sorted by Price: Low to High

workflows.name: Sort results by Price: High to Low
workflows.on_success: results updated and sorted by Price: High to Low

workflows.name: Sort results by Star Rating
workflows.on_success: results updated and sorted by Star Rating

workflows.name: Sort results by Guest Rating
workflows.on_success: results updated and sorted by Guest Rating

workflows.name: Remove an active filter from summary
workflows.on_success: removes this filter and updates results

workflows.name: Reset all active filters
workflows.on_success: clears all filters and updates results

workflows.name: Initiate booking from a hotel card
workflows.on_success: initiates booking flow for selected hotel

workflows.name: Select Room (row action) reveals booking form
workflows.on_success: reveals booking form and populates Selected_Hotel and Selected_Room_Type

workflows.name: Book Now with Selected_Room_Type visible (requires user logged in)
workflows.on_success: proceeds to payment page

workflows.name: Search flights
workflows.on_success: redirects to Flights Results page

workflows.name: Select a flight from results
workflows.on_success: navigates to booking flow for selected flight

workflows.name: Expand flight result details
workflows.on_success: expands result to show baggage allowance, fare rules, and seat availability

workflows.name: Complete passenger and contact details and Continue to payment
workflows.on_success: navigates to Payment page

workflows.name: Search tours using the main search form
workflows.on_success: redirects to Tours_Listing_Page

workflows.name: Book Now — authenticated (opens booking form)
workflows.on_success: opens Booking Form

workflows.name: Book Now — unauthenticated (redirect to login)
workflows.on_success: redirects to login page

workflows.name: Submit Booking — authenticated (submits booking)
workflows.on_success: submits booking

workflows.name: Submit Booking — unauthenticated (redirect to login)
workflows.on_success: redirects to login page

workflows.name: Submit car search form
workflows.on_success: redirects to listing page

workflows.name: Book Now from listing
workflows.on_success: initiates booking for selected vehicle

workflows.name: Confirm booking after accepting terms with valid fields
workflows.on_success: proceeds to payment

workflows.name: View Visa Requirements
workflows.on_success: shows visa requirements (visa type, processing time, required documents, fees) for the selected Nationality and Destination Country

workflows.name: Submit Visa Application
workflows.on_success: creates visa application in Pending status and lists the application in Bookings dashboard

workflows.name: View Application from Bookings
workflows.on_success: opens application detail for tracking status

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - View Details
workflows.on_success: navigates to booking detail

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - Cancel
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Pending AND cancellation_policy_allows_cancellation AND status != Cancelled
workflows.on_success: changes status to Cancelled

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - Modify
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Pending AND booking_type_allows_modification AND cancellation_policy_allows_modification
workflows.on_success: initiates modification flow

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - Download Confirmation
workflows.on_success: downloads confirmation document

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - Download Invoice
workflows.on_success: downloads invoice

workflows.name: My Bookings - Pending - Download Voucher
workflows.on_success: downloads voucher

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - View Details
workflows.on_success: navigates to booking detail

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - Cancel
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Confirmed AND cancellation_policy_allows_cancellation AND status != Cancelled
workflows.on_success: changes status to Cancelled

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - Modify
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Confirmed AND booking_type_allows_modification AND cancellation_policy_allows_modification
workflows.on_success: initiates modification flow

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - Download Confirmation
workflows.on_success: downloads confirmation document

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - Download Invoice
workflows.on_success: downloads invoice

workflows.name: My Bookings - Confirmed - Download Voucher
workflows.on_success: downloads voucher

workflows.name: My Bookings - Cancelled - View Details
workflows.on_success: navigates to booking detail

workflows.name: My Bookings - Cancelled - Download Invoice
workflows.on_success: downloads invoice

workflows.name: My Bookings - Cancelled - Download Voucher
workflows.on_success: downloads voucher

workflows.name: My Profile - Edit
workflows.on_success: enables profile edit mode

workflows.name: My Profile - Save
workflows.on_success: updates profile

workflows.name: My Profile - Cancel Edit
workflows.on_success: cancels profile edit

workflows.name: Reviews - Write Review (eligible completed booking)
workflows.on_success: opens Review_Form

workflows.name: Review Form - Submit Review
workflows.on_success: saves review

workflows.name: Review Form - Cancel
workflows.on_success: cancels review entry

workflows.name: Settings - Save Settings
workflows.on_success: updates user settings

workflows.name: Logout - End Session
workflows.on_success: ends session

workflows.name: Modify booking
workflows.on_success: applies requested modifications, charges applicable fees as needed, updates booking, and sends modification email notification

workflows.name: Cancel booking
workflows.on_success: processes cancellation, initiates refund to the original payment method, changes booking status to Cancelled, and sends cancellation email notification

workflows.name: Submit payment using Credit/Debit Card
workflows.on_success: redirects to Booking Confirmation page with reference number

workflows.name: Submit payment using PayPal or Bank Transfer or Wallet/Credits
workflows.conditional_branch: Payment_Method == PayPal OR Payment_Method == Bank Transfer OR Payment_Method == Wallet/Credits
workflows.on_success: redirects to Booking Confirmation page with reference number

workflows.name: Download Invoice after Credit/Debit Card payment
workflows.on_success: downloads invoice PDF

workflows.name: Download Voucher after Credit/Debit Card payment
workflows.on_success: downloads voucher PDF

workflows.name: Download Invoice after PayPal or Bank Transfer or Wallet/Credits payment
workflows.conditional_branch: Payment_Method == PayPal OR Payment_Method == Bank Transfer OR Payment_Method == Wallet/Credits
workflows.on_success: downloads invoice PDF

workflows.name: Download Voucher after PayPal or Bank Transfer or Wallet/Credits payment
workflows.conditional_branch: Payment_Method == PayPal OR Payment_Method == Bank Transfer OR Payment_Method == Wallet/Credits
workflows.on_success: downloads voucher PDF

workflows.name: Change Currency (authenticated) — Update_Prices
workflows.on_success: updates all prices across the site in real-time without losing the user's current search context

workflows.name: Change Currency (authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Profile
workflows.on_success: saves selected currency to authenticated user's profile

workflows.name: Change Currency (not authenticated) — Update_Prices
workflows.on_success: updates all prices across the site in real-time without losing the user's current search context

workflows.name: Change Currency (not authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Session
workflows.on_success: stores selected currency in session/cookie for the current browsing session

workflows.name: Change Language (English/Spanish/French, authenticated) — Switch_Interface_Language
workflows.conditional_branch: user is authenticated AND Language != Arabic
workflows.on_success: switches entire site interface including navigation labels, form labels, and content to the chosen language

workflows.name: Change Language (English/Spanish/French, authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Profile
workflows.conditional_branch: user is authenticated AND Language != Arabic
workflows.on_success: saves selected language to authenticated user's profile

workflows.name: Change Language (English/Spanish/French, not authenticated) — Switch_Interface_Language
workflows.conditional_branch: user is not authenticated AND Language != Arabic
workflows.on_success: switches entire site interface including navigation labels, form labels, and content to the chosen language

workflows.name: Change Language (English/Spanish/French, not authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Session
workflows.conditional_branch: user is not authenticated AND Language != Arabic
workflows.on_success: stores selected language in session/cookie for the current browsing session

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, authenticated) — Switch_Interface_Language
workflows.conditional_branch: user is authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: switches entire site interface including navigation labels, form labels, and content to the chosen language

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, authenticated) — Apply_Layout_Direction_If_Needed
workflows.conditional_branch: user is authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: applies layout direction change for languages that require it (e.g., RTL for Arabic)

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Profile
workflows.conditional_branch: user is authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: saves selected language to authenticated user's profile

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, not authenticated) — Switch_Interface_Language
workflows.conditional_branch: user is not authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: switches entire site interface including navigation labels, form labels, and content to the chosen language

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, not authenticated) — Apply_Layout_Direction_If_Needed
workflows.conditional_branch: user is not authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: applies layout direction change for languages that require it (e.g., RTL for Arabic)

workflows.name: Change Language (Arabic, not authenticated) — Persist_Preference_To_Session
workflows.conditional_branch: user is not authenticated AND Language == Arabic
workflows.on_success: stores selected language in session/cookie for the current browsing session

workflows.on_success: creates review and associates it with the item

workflows.name: Open review submission from dashboard action
workflows.on_success: opens review submission form

workflows.name: Open review submission from post-stay email prompt
workflows.actor: recipient who completed booking (may be prompted to authenticate)
workflows.on_success: opens review submission form

workflows.name: Apply Filters
workflows.on_success: filters offers list

workflows.name: Clear Filters
workflows.on_success: resets filters to default

workflows.name: Subscribe to Newsletter
workflows.on_success: subscribed to newsletter

workflows.name: Book Now - Apply Promo Code
workflows.on_success: applies promotional code to booking flow

workflows.on_success: redirects to pre-filled search with discounted rates applied

workflows.name: Open Terms and Conditions
workflows.on_success: opens terms and conditions

workflows.name: Logout from authenticated session
workflows.on_success: terminates current session; clears sensitive session data; redirects to home page; subsequent attempts to access protected pages redirect to login page
